channel.title: kms on My Blog - For Fun
channel.description: Recent content in kms on My Blog - For Fun

item.title: How to Build a Kms Server
item.description: How to build a kms server Option 1: docker mode docker pull luodaoyi/kms-server docker run -itd -p 1688:1688 --name kms luodaoyi/kms-server docker update --restart=always $dockername Option 2: docker compose docker-compose.yml version:'3'services:frontend:image:luodaoyi/kms-servercontainer_name:mykmsports:- 1688:1688restart:alwaysdocker-compose start the container docker-compose up -d Active Script echo "To active office" cd "%programfiles%\Microsoft Office\Office16" cscript ospp.vbs /sethst:xx.xx.xx.xx cscript ospp.vbs /act echo "to active windows" slmgr /skms xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx slmgr /ato Reference blog
